name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use SearchRewards:

Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

🔍 Search — Find information and earn rewards
👥 Referrals — Invite friends and earn $0.01 per referral
💸 Withdraw — Cash out your earnings

Everything in this bot is reachable by tapping — you don't need to remember any commands.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
